texto: In the evening, I would tell my patients, sleep with the angels. In the morning, I would say to each as the French farmers still do, "Good morning to your and your companion" - meaning, of course, their angel.
explicacao: Citação de Eileen Elias Freeman sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “In the evening, I would tell my patients, sleep with the angels. In the morning, I would say to e…” articula reflexao, angels, would em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e reflexao.

frase_original: In the evening, I would tell my patients, sleep with the angels. In the morning, I would say to each as the French farmers still do, "Good morning to your and your companion" - meaning, of course, their angel.
